_comment: Copy this file to e2e-credentials.json and fill in your test accounts. NEVER commit e2e-credentials.json to git.

wechat_mp.note: Login at https://mp.weixin.qq.com/ then export cookies

zhihu.note: Login at https://www.zhihu.com/signin then export cookies

weibo.note: Login at https://weibo.com/login then export cookies

douyin.note: Login at https://creator.douyin.com/ then export cookies

xiaohongshu.note: Login at https://creator.xiaohongshu.com/ then export cookies

tencent_video.note: Login at https://channels.weixin.qq.com/ then export cookies

kuaishou.note: Login at https://cp.kuaishou.com/ then export cookies

toutiao.note: Login at https://mp.toutiao.com/ then export cookies

youtube.note: Login at https://studio.youtube.com/ (Google OAuth, cookies expire quickly)

tiktok.note: Login at https://www.tiktok.com/upload/ then export cookies

bilibili.note: Login at https://passport.bilibili.com/login (supports QR + SMS). API mode available.

baijiahao.note: Login at https://baijiahao.baidu.com/ then export cookies

twitter.note: Login at https://x.com/i/flow/login then export cookies

instagram.note: Login at https://www.instagram.com/accounts/login/ then export cookies

facebook.note: Login at https://www.facebook.com/login/ then export cookies
